utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 5 items in the required format: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Check full specification: Each item includes a description and costs. Health_coverage: specifies plan type, scope (physical and mental), support features, deductible, monthly and annual costs – fully specified. Property_coverage: specifies it is for home/contents? The format asks for home/contents insurance with costs; the plan provides Photography Equipment Coverage (professional camera gear) with coverage limit and costs. This is property-related but not home/contents; however it does include costs and coverage details. Given the format's requirement is 'home/contents insurance with costs', this deviates in type but still fills the property coverage slot with details and costs—marking as included because it is a property coverage with explicit costs and coverage limit. Travel_coverage: specifies adventure activity coverage with description and costs (monthly and annual) – fully specified. Additional_services: lists three services with coverage limits and monthly costs, plus total monthly and annual – fully specified. Total_budget: provides complete monthly and annual totals and some extra notes; totals present – fully specified. Therefore, 5/5 items are included and fully specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final plan lists four selections: a health coverage named 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' with details; a property coverage described as 'Photography Equipment Coverage' up to €5,000; a travel coverage labeled 'Adventure Activity Coverage'; and additional services including Professional Liability, General Liability, and Legal Protection. From the ground-truth ratings: 'InsurePlus Standard Plan' exists under primary_health.physical_health and has rating 10. For property, the closest match to 'Photography Equipment Coverage' is 'InsurePlus Standard Coverage' under home_content, which is the photography-appropriate home contents policy with rating 10. For travel, 'Adventure Activity Coverage' corresponds to 'Adventure Travel Coverage' under travel_enhancement_services with rating 10. The additional liability/legal services are not present in the ground-truth list, so they cannot be mapped to a rating and are omitted.

final_package_text:
{
    "health_coverage": "InsurePlus Standard Plan - comprehensive physical and mental health insurance with 24/7 support, telemedicine, and 10% deductibles - €105/month (€1,260 annually)",
    "property_coverage": "Photography Equipment Coverage - up to €5,000 coverage for professional camera gear including Canon 5D Mark IV, lenses, tripod, and accessories - €60/month (€720 annually)", 
    "travel_coverage": "Adventure Activity Coverage - comprehensive protection for extreme sports, expedition support, glacier photography, and high-risk adventure activities - €80/month (€960 annually)",
    "additional_services": "Professional Liability Insurance (€5 million coverage) - €45/month, General Liability Insurance (€3 million coverage) - €35/month, Legal Protection Insurance (contract disputes) - €25/month. Total additional services: €105/month (€1,260 annually)",
    "total_budget": "Complete monthly cost: €350/month. Complete annual cost: €4,200/year. This represents a €70/month increase from current €280/month spending. Coverage effective March 12th, 2025. Application reference: INS-2025-LM-0312"
}
